name: @agentic-collab/tldraw-bundle
description: OFFLINE, dev-only build tool that vendors tldraw + React into a single self-contained ESM bundle for the dashboard's sketch canvas (RFC-010). NEVER part of the running app. The committed bundle (src/dashboard/vendor/tldraw/) is the artifact the runtime consumes; this package is the human-run bundler. tldraw/react/react-dom/esbuild MUST NOT appear in the repo-root package.json.
